chapter_title.ar: باب وَصِيَّةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ (صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ وسلم) وَ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ (علیہ السلام) فِي السَّرَايَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 8 – Advice of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> and Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> regarding the battallions

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/353)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/353)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ مَا بَيَّتَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) عَدُوّاً قَطُّ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Mahboub, from Abbad Bin Suheyb who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> never planned (allowed) a night (attack) against an enemy at all’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa, from ibn Mahbub from ‘Abbad ibn Suhayb who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, never launched a surprise attack against the enemy during the night.’”
